sub_modules.ifft16_bitrev_index: Combinational bit-reversal mapper used during the DIT input load phase.
sub_modules.ifft16_stage_addr_gen: Combinational radix-2 stage address and twiddle-index generator with loop-end flags.
sub_modules.ifft16_twiddle_rom: Combinational Q1.15 twiddle coefficient lookup table for N=16; mode selects FFT negative sine or IFFT positive sine.
sub_modules.ifft16_butterfly: Combinational fixed-point complex radix-2 butterfly with rounded Q1.15 twiddle multiplication.
sub_modules.ifft16_output_scaler: Combinational final output scaler; divides by 16 in IFFT mode and passes through in FFT mode.
